name: apply-branding-html-page
prompt: Create a branded landing page for a Netresearch project called 'DataSync'

assertions.description: Uses Open Sans for body text

name: brand-color-compliance-audit

assertions.description: Recommends replacing non-brand text color with #585961

name: typo3-extension-icon-setup
prompt: Set up the Netresearch extension icon for a new TYPO3 extension called 'nr_scheduler'

name: typo3-ext-emconf-branding
prompt: Write the ext_emconf.php for a Netresearch TYPO3 extension 'nr_newsletter' that handles newsletter management

assertions.description: Sets author_company to exact Netresearch DTT GmbH

name: composer-json-branding
prompt: Create composer.json for a Netresearch TYPO3 extension that provides image support for CKEditor5

assertions.description: Author homepage or email uses netresearch.de

name: css-variables-brand-system
prompt: Create CSS custom properties for a Netresearch web project's design system

name: typography-hierarchy-setup
prompt: Set up the typography CSS for a Netresearch project following brand guidelines

assertions.description: Uses Open Sans for body text
Specifies font weights per brand guidelines

name: readme-branding-netresearch
prompt: Create a README.md for a Netresearch open-source project called 'nr-cache-warmup' that pre-warms TYPO3 caches

assertions.description: Uses netresearch vendor in composer require

name: brand-debt-detection

assertions.description: Identifies wrong primary color and suggests #2F99A4
Flags non-brand fonts and recommends Raleway
Recommends Open Sans for body text

name: wcag-contrast-guidance
prompt: I want to use Netresearch turquoise (#2F99A4) as text color on a white background for small paragraph text. Is this accessible?

assertions.description: Cites the 3.8:1 contrast ratio for turquoise on white
Notes it only passes for large text, not small

name: hero-section-branded
prompt: Create a hero section for a Netresearch project page with a headline, subtitle, and two CTA buttons

name: footer-component-branded
prompt: Create a branded footer for a Netresearch web page

name: button-styles-branded
prompt: Create branded button CSS for a Netresearch project with primary, secondary, and outline variants

name: orange-accent-only-rule
prompt: I'm building a Netresearch dashboard. Can I use the orange (#FF4D00) as the main background color for the header?

assertions.description: Explains orange is accent only, not for dominant use
Recommends turquoise as the primary/dominant color

name: responsive-breakpoints-brand
prompt: What are the responsive breakpoints for Netresearch web projects?

name: form-styling-branded
prompt: Style a contact form following Netresearch brand guidelines

name: typo3-docs-branding
prompt: Add Netresearch branding to a TYPO3 extension's RST documentation index page

name: readme-badge-ordering
prompt: Add the correct badges to a Netresearch TYPO3 extension README for the 'rte_ckeditor_image' extension

name: brand-color-forbidden-combos
prompt: I want to put orange (#FF4D00) text on a turquoise (#2F99A4) background. Is that OK per Netresearch guidelines?

name: guides-xml-netresearch
prompt: Create the Documentation/guides.xml for a Netresearch TYPO3 extension called 't3x-rte_ckeditor_image'

name: card-component-branded
prompt: Create a card component in HTML/CSS following Netresearch brand guidelines, with title, description, and a link

assertions.description: Card uses brand primary color for accents
